claims.summary: Recess should distinguish expansive daydreaming from dense structural stabilization instead of treating all high entropy as idle drift.
claims.rationale: Minime `density_aware_recess_profile_v1` names structural stabilization and remains read-only; focused Recess tests pass.

claims.summary: Dense Recess should route toward shadow/pressure exhale or sedimentation preflight without silently changing behavior.
claims.rationale: `recess_density_mitigation_v1`, `recess_sedimentation_compaction_readiness_v1`, and `recess_divergence_buffer_review_v1` expose routes and gates while preserving live caps.

claims.summary: Automatic porosity adjustment or Recess density thinning would be a live Minime control change.
claims.rationale: Auto-porosity and density-thinning would mutate live sensory/regulator behavior and remain Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
